comments.body: ![](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/pdw2sawMR5JScdE4KtuZTW4KV/?name=image001.png)

Hello Tina,

To change the name in the From Address, Navigate to App Settings -> From Address. (Refer to screenshot 1)

The changes will be applicable to New orders.

For label-created orders, for the changes to appear in the orders, Select Orders -> Advanced -> Cancel Shipment -> Select the Orders again -> Prepare Shipment -> Generate Label. (Refer to screenshot 2)

Yes, the logo can be added to the Tax Invoice. Please allow us some time to enable this feature for your store.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/isHrMVKXpetlWYWPMVRMoHAdM/?name=image.png)

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/41OrfxjtdJjuR1n7LxGOym0N8/?name=image.png)

Thanks and Regards,
Sagar K S
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Tina,
 
To change the name in the From Address, Navigate to App Settings -> From Address. (Refer to screenshot 1)
 
The changes will be applicable to New orders.
 
For label-created orders, for the changes to appear in the orders, Select Orders -> Advanced -> Cancel Shipment -> Select the Orders again -> Prepare Shipment -> Generate Label. (Refer to screenshot 2)
 
Yes, the logo can be added to the Tax Invoice. Please allow us some time to enable this feature for your store.
 

 

 
Thanks and Regards,

comments.html_body:
Hi Sagar

 

I am having a browse through the settings

 

I see that in the Tax Invoice settings there is a Tax Identification Number listed

Please advise where this Tax ID number came from & what it is ?? as it is not our ABN (Australian Business Number) which is the Tax number in Australia

comments.body:
Hello Tina,

We will be enabling the Tax Invoice Customization feature for your store.
However, the logo needs to be added from your end. This can be done with the help of your website developer.

Tax Identification Number is used by entities that have a need to interact with the ATO. Examples of such interactions include the need to report information to the ATO, lodge income tax returns or interact in the superannuation (retirement income) system.
If Tax Identification Number is keyed in, then the same will be shown on the Tax Invoice. You can add your ABN (Australian Business Number) if you want to show it on the Tax Invoice.
The Tax Invoice you are referring to is a random number. You can add your ABN in the field provided.

Thanks and Regards,
Sagar K S
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Tina,

Regarding Tax Invoice Customization, please refer to the article for more details - Setting up Shopify Multi Carrier Shipping Label App - PluginHive

To initiate a pickup for your shipments through the app, You need to request pick up by clicking on the option "Request Pick Up”.

Regarding packing your products on pallets for weight greater than 30 kg, you can use the box packing method where you can create boxes based on weight and dimensions.
A suitable box will be selected for packing based on the product's weight and dimensions.
Navigate to App Settings -> Shipping -> Packaging.
Please refer to the article for more details on Packing Methods - Packing methods in Shopify Multi Carrier Shipping Label App (pluginhive.com)
Please refer to the video for more details on the working of Box Packing - https://youtu.be/Cdt2hqF6wRU

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/s9sdORwUpSeJuXDtIUI4jniqO/?name=image.png)

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/CgVDPaowwsVqFqb0bUHtqKrdk/?name=image.png)

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/rCIJihKoVaXOYpySqCdlYQV9X/?name=image.png)

Thanks and Regards,
Sagar K S
Team PluginHive

Regarding packing your products on pallets for weight greater than 30 kg, you can use the box packing method where you can create boxes based on weight and dimensions.
A suitable box will be selected for packing based on the product's weight and dimensions.

Please refer to the article for more details on Packing Methods - Packing methods in Shopify Multi Carrier Shipping Label App (pluginhive.com)

comments.body:
Hello Tina,

You were getting an error from TNT Australia. The error message indicated that TNT Australia had reached its capacity on 12/06/2023 and was unable to accept any new bookings for that day.

However, upon further investigation, we discovered that the issue was due to 12/06/2023 being a holiday in Australia.

We have now updated the Holiday List for Australia, and are able to get the shipping rates now. Please double-check from your end and confirm.

Additionally, I wanted to let you know that we have enabled Custom Packing Slip for your store. Do check it out and let me know.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/7dClPj0sW64w3RHX53Km5uo4U/?name=Screen+Shot+2023-06-09+at+6.23.01+PM.png)

Awaiting your confirmation.

Thanks and Regards,
Keerthi
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Tina,
 
You were getting an error from TNT Australia. The error message indicated that TNT Australia had reached its capacity on 12/06/2023 and was unable to accept any new bookings for that day. 
 
However, upon further investigation, we discovered that the issue was due to 12/06/2023 being a holiday in Australia.
 
We have now updated the Holiday List for Australia, and are able to get the shipping rates now. Please double-check from your end and confirm.
 
Additionally, I wanted to let you know that we have enabled Custom Packing Slip for your store. Do check it out and let me know.
 

 
Awaiting your confirmation.
 
Thanks and Regards,

Hello Tina,

To add the logo to the Tax Invoice, please add the logo image in the Store Settings.
Navigate to App Settings -> Store -> Other Details. (Refer to screenshot 1)

Once done, the logo will be shown on the Invoice. The changes will apply to new orders. Once the logo is added, create a sample order and generate labels to see the changes.

If you want to check the changes for the existing orders, then you need to cancel the labels for the orders and regenerate the labels.
To cancel the labels, Select Order -> Advanced -> Cancel Shipment -> Select the Order again -> Prepare Shipment -> Generate Labels. (Refer to screenshot 2)

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/1WAhGOj8o5JuiL2lwUbZGly7H/?name=image.png)

Team PluginHive

Hello Tina,

To ensure an accurate calculation of the shipment rate from TNT Australia, it is important to configure the correct cut-off time for your region.
You can check the rate request log to determine the appropriate cut-off time or use a default cut-off time of 12:00 PM.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/Y3gWdcbKwT4op1Q8h0UPe12AO/?name=image.png)

We have set the Company Close time as 2:00 PM and the Pickup Time as 11:30 AM. The rates issue will not occur in the future.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/zD9Oq0xU4Q6nol1TGiCRDixLY/?name=image.png)

If an order is placed after the cut-off time, the app will automatically consider the next business day as the shipment date. The app also takes into account Sundays and TNT Australia holidays, which are listed below.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/rvd2loVnHISetBKc1K4Z12e2g/?name=Screen+Shot+2023-03-23+at+3.15.53+PM.png)

Hello Tina,
 
Good day!
 
To ensure an accurate calculation of the shipment rate from TNT Australia, it is important to configure the correct cut-off time for your region.
You can check the rate request log to determine the appropriate cut-off time or use a default cut-off time of 12:00 PM.
 

 
We have set the Company Close time as 2:00 PM and the Pickup Time as 11:30 AM. The rates issue will not occur in the future.
 

 
If an order is placed after the cut-off time, the app will automatically consider the next business day as the shipment date. The app also takes into account Sundays and TNT Australia holidays, which are listed below.
 

 
Let us know for any further queries.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Sagar K S
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Tina,

If a customer makes a transaction after the booking time is passed (for ex: 5:00 PM), then the next day will be considered and rates will be shown accordingly.
The customer will see the rates from the app.

You can get the XMLs of a Transaction by Navigating to App Settings -> Shipping Rates -> Request Log -> Next to a Transaction ID click on i -> under Automation Summary, you can see and download the XMLs.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/mAjqZpcF1R7Wcn7Utx97SIjQU/?name=image.png)

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/33zY7mlfU6GWK4PafKdqlWUEc/?name=image.png)


Thanks and Regards,

Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Tina,

You are using recommended packing method i.e. weight-based packing method in this packing method the dimensions will not be used for packaging and rates calculation.

If you are looking to calculate the shipping cost based on the weight and dimensions of the product we request you please enable the volumetric weight option so that volumetric weight will be calculated based on product weight and dimensions and the rates will be calculated accordingly.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/wkqQ3t1XHk4iYe5UX5EBMzv0E/?name=image.png)

If you are looking to pack your items into boxes then we request you please update the packaging method to the box packing method and add your boxes.
You can refer to the article How packaging method works - https://www.pluginhive.com/knowledge-base/packing-methods-shopify-multi-carrier-shipping-label-app/

Regarding your query about dimensions 10X10 X10 cm in request: If a package has no dimensions the default dimensions will be passed this package's default dimensions will be carrier specific you can ignore this part.

Please note that the store default dimensions will be considered as product dimensions only when the products have no dimensions.

We hope the above explanation helps you.

Do check and let us know if you need any assistance

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

Hello Tina,

Thanks for providing the details.

I have thoroughly reviewed the case from our end.

Currently, you are utilizing the Weight Based Packing Method with the Volumetric Weight option enabled. When the Volumetric Weight option is enabled, the system considers the higher weight between the Actual Weight and Volumetric Weight as the package weight.

For the product "DSS Holden Commodore VE-VF Sedan Carbon Fibre 1-Piece CV Driveshaft (Automatic)" with the SKU GMG8SH2-C-CV, the Actual Weight is 13 kg, and the Volumetric Weight is 10 kg. In this particular case, since the actual weight (13 kg) is higher, it is being used as the package weight, and the rates are being displayed accordingly. Please note that for TNT Australia, a default dimension of 10x10x10 will be automatically sent in the request.

However, when you were using the TNT Australia website, you were inputting the actual product weight and dimensions, and since the dimensions have larger values such as 176 cm, there might be additional charges involved.

If you prefer to continue using the Weight Based Packing method itself, then you need to input the weight as 13 kg and dimensions as 10x10x10 cm on the TNT Australia website in order to check the rates accurately.

On the other hand, if you want the rates to be determined based on the actual product dimensions, then you can opt for the Box Packing method and create individual boxes to pack each product. This method takes into account the weight and actual dimensions of the products for packing purposes. I have already created a box with dimensions similar to the product SKU GMG8SH2-C-CV. After doing so, I checked for the rates at checkout, and the correct rates were displayed.
Request ID: ed479fc17d4859570463adcd057eb1db
(Refer to screenshots 1, 2, 3, and 4)

If you prefer to pack each product individually, you can set the products as Pre-Packed. This way, the products will be packed separately based on their individual weight and dimensions. To do so, please navigate to Products -> All Products -> Select the Product -> Shipping. (Refer to screenshots 5, 6, and 7) For bulk products, this can be achieved through a CSV file.

Please review the information provided and feel free to reach out if you have any further inquiries.

After doing so, I checked for the rates at checkout, and the correct rates were displayed. 
Request ID: ed479fc17d4859570463adcd057eb1db
(Refer to screenshots 1, 2, 3, and 4)
 
If you prefer to pack each product individually, you can set the products as Pre-Packed. This way, the products will be packed separately based on their individual weight and dimensions. To do so, please navigate to Products -> All Products -> Select the Product -> Shipping. (Refer to screenshots 5, 6, and 7) For bulk products, this can be achieved through a CSV file.
 
Please review the information provided and feel free to reach out if you have any further inquiries.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Thanks and Regards,
Sagar K S
Team PluginHive
